File exists at hooks/apis/notification/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts, exactly matching the required pattern.

expectations.text: NotificationList 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useEffect+fetch 패턴이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx contains no useEffect or direct fetch calls; it delegates data fetching to useGetNotifications hook.
NotificationList.tsx line 15: if (isLoading) branch renders a skeleton loading UI with data-testid='notifications-loading'.
NotificationList.tsx line 25: if (error) branch renders error message with data-testid='notifications-error'.
NotificationList.tsx line 60: filteredNotifications.length === 0 renders '알림이 없습니다' with data-testid='notifications-empty'.
